pokemon:iron-treads.name: Iron Treads
pokemon:iron-treads.summary: This Pokémon closely resembles a scientific weapon that a paranormal magazine claimed was sent to this planet by aliens.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon closely resembles a scientific weapon that a paranormal magazine claimed was sent to this planet by aliens.
Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. It resembles a mysterious object described in an old expedition journal.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon closely resembles a scientific weapon that a paranormal magazine claimed was sent to this planet by aliens.

form:iron-treads.name: Iron Treads
form:iron-treads.summary: Iron Treads form with Ground / Steel typing.
